title: Ceramic Piggy Bank | Blue Pig design | 1 Pc
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES 1 Ceramic Blue Piggy Bank | 12x9x10 cm | 0.3 kg
CUTE DESIGN: Teach your kids how to save money with this cute coin bank that features a glossy white ceramic pig covered with baby blue stars and a text that says "My first Piggy Bank".
PERFECT GIFT FOR CHILDREN: Gift your kids this cute piggy bank on any special day and teach them the importance of saving money at an early age.
HIGH QUALITY: This coin bank is made from high quality ceramics that give a cute pig shape and design.
CHILD-FRIENDLY: This cute coin bank is attractive for kids and is specially made for them.
description: Product Description Gift your kids this cute coin bank on any special day and teach them the importance of saving money at an early age. Safety Warning No warning applicable
